summary: AccountsBoard refactoring complete - All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend 3-tab layout verified. Dashboard, Cashbook, and Cheque Management tabs working correctly with Smart Payment feature.

features_tested.notes: Login with accountant@constructionos.com redirects to /accounts-board
Dashboard, Cashbook, Cheque Management tabs visible and switchable
Shows payment modes (Cash, Current A/c, Savings A/c, Cheque, Petty Cash, Miscellaneous, Cash DT, Suspense A/c, Total) with income/expense breakdown
Shows Overall Expense (₹29,64,363), Material (₹8,41,893), Labour (₹6,24,118), Petty Cash (₹6,000), Suspense (₹0), Other (₹14,98,352)
Collapsible section showing 13 projects with income/expense/balance
From/To date pickers and Project filter dropdown working
Shows 27 income entries with S.No, Date & Time, Project, Stage, Mode, Txn ID, Amount, Action columns
Shows 68 expense entries with filter buttons (All, Material, Labour, Petty Cash, Other)
Inline form appears with Type, Date, Mode, Amount, Vendor, Project fields and Submit button
Shows Total (4), Incoming (1), Outgoing (3), Pending (4), Bounced (0), Cleared (0)
All, Incoming, Outgoing, Pending, Bounced filter tabs working
Search input with placeholder 'Search cheques...' present

features_tested.feature: Cheque Management Tab - Add Cheque Dialog
features_tested.notes: Dialog has Cheque Number, Amount, Cheque Date, Type (Incoming/Outgoing), Bank Name, Branch, Party Name, Party Type, Project, Post-Dated checkbox, Remarks

features_tested.feature: Cheque Management Tab - Smart Pay Button
features_tested.notes: Smart Pay dialog opens with Select Cheque, Vendor Name, Project, Category, Expense Amount, Description, Remarks, Process Payment button
Edit button on each cheque row - can update status to issued/deposited/cleared/bounced/cancelled/post_dated
Blue alert card shows vendor suspense balances (e.g., TEST_SmartPayVendor: ₹20,000)
Sub-nav shows Accounts Board, Approvals, Expenses, HR Portal links
Returns summary with total_income, total_expense, net_balance, income/expense entries
Returns list of available outgoing cheques for payment
Returns all vendor suspense balances
Smart payment processes correctly - excess amount goes to vendor suspense
Creates both incoming and outgoing cheques with all fields
Updates cheque status (issued → deposited → cleared/bounced)

issues: Demo Access shows super_admin nav instead of accountant-specific nav, but sub-nav shows correct accountant links

critical_code_review_comments: AccountsBoard.jsx well-structured with 3 tab components (DashboardTab, CashbookTab, ChequeManagementTab)
Smart Payment feature correctly handles excess amount → vendor suspense flow
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
Date range filtering working correctly on cashbook endpoint

test_credentials.demo_access: Use Demo Access tab > Accountant button

seed_data_creation: Created test cheques (TEST_SMARTPAY_*, TEST_STATUS_*, TEST_CHQ_IN_*, TEST_CHQ_*) and expenses (TEST_Expense, TEST_SmartPayVendor) during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AccountsBoard refactored with 3-tab layout fully tested. Dashboard shows financial overview with payment modes and expense categories. Cashbook has date filters and inline expense form. Cheque Management has full CRUD + Smart Payment feature for vendor suspense handling. Backend endpoints: /api/accountant/cashbook-filtered, /api/accountant/cheques, /api/accountant/uncleared-cheques, /api/accountant/all-vendor-suspense, /api/accountant/vendor-suspense/{vendor_name}, /api/accountant/cheque-payment. Test cheques prefixed with TEST_ were created.
